SELECT value, accurateCast(value, 'UInt8') as uint8_cast FROM test_table WHERE value < 256;
SELECT value, accurateCast(value, 'UInt16') as uint16_cast FROM test_table WHERE value < 65536;
SELECT accurateCast(-1, 'UInt8') as uint8_cast_exception FROM test_table WHERE value = -1;
SELECT accurateCast(256, 'UInt8') as uint8_cast_exception FROM test_table WHERE value = 256;
SELECT accurateCast(100000, 'UInt16') as uint16_cast_valid FROM test_table WHERE value = 100000 ORDER BY value;
SELECT accurateCast(value, 'Float32') as float_cast FROM test_table;
SELECT accurateCast(value, 'Decimal(5, 2)') as decimal_cast FROM test_table;
CREATE TABLE subquery_table (id UInt8, val Int32);
SELECT id, accurateCast(val, 'UInt8') as cast_val FROM subquery_table WHERE val >= 0;
